title: 50 Million Frenchmen
writer: Herbert Fields, E. Ray Goetz, Cole Porter
actors: Ole Olsen, Chic Johnson, William Gaxton
plot: Independently-wealthy American Jack Forbes has just arrived in Paris. Because of his wealth he can have any woman on his arm. Currently that role is filled by Marcelle Dubrey, but he ditches her when he spots the woman of his drea...
